Nav links

Master Data Management for Manufacturers

Data quality is the heart of modern manufacturing.

Why MDM Matters

Without consistent master data, even the best analytics fail.

Top Three Risks

  • Duplicate vendors in the ERP
  • Inconsistent part-number formats
  • Stale customer records

Implementation Pattern

  1. Audit current state
  2. Pick a hub-and-spoke topology
  3. Run a 90-day pilot

See the whitepaper, or visit our learning site.
